prompt:
Transform this image into a dark, cinematic street-art fantasy scene.

Keep the person exactly the same - same body, pose, clothing, proportions, angle, and lighting. Do not change the face, outfit, or posture.

Add three large metallic gothic crosses emerging from the wall behind the person's back, arranged diagonally like wings.

The crosses should look chrome / silver metal, sharp-edged, reflective, and slightly worn.

The crosses must appear embedded into the wall, glowing subtly with white highlights and emitting a faint smoky aura where they break through the concrete.

Maintain realistic shadows, reflections, and depth so the crosses feel physically present and heavy. Overall mood: dark, cinematic, high-contrast, monochrome, gritty urban aesthetic. Ultra-realistic, dramatic lighting, sharp focus, editorial fashion photography style.

Professional or workplace, University or college, School

or teenage. Provide 4 haircut options per scenario, each

with a short, specific explanation of why it suits my

geometry and hair behavior. After the recommendationg0.7K

generate a 3x3 grid of haircut images, each placed

9:16 orientation, 4K quality, Realistic lighting, Natural hair

Mix short, medium, and slightly longer styles, Reflect the

recommended haircuts, Maintain consistency with my

real hair type and proportions. Output must be

structured, clean, and easy to compare across

professional grooming quality

Use the uploaded reference photo as the single

and exclusive facial identity source. The same exact face must appear in ALL three frames with no variation.

Do not reinterpret, regenerate, beautify, or modify the face between frames.

Facial identity has highest priority over lighting, angle, blur, or realism.

Ultra-realistic vertical image split equally into three stacked frames (top / middle / bottom) within one single photo. All frames show the same person with the same face, same outfit, same location, captured seconds apart like a burst of candid smartphone shots. Only subtle movement changes. Feels accidental, real, and human. Location & background:

Open beach night at a modern resort outdoors at night. Wooden tent in background, Warm lights glowing softly near the tent. Dark night sky visible. Beachy atmosphere. Real, moment - not staged. Outfit (locked):

Lime green vertically striped button-down shirt, top buttons open showing slight chest. Full Sleeves rolled to forearms. High-waisted cream tailored trousers. Metal wristwatch on one wrist. No jacket, no accessories beyond the watch.

Hair & Face (LOCKED)

Medium-length, thick, naturally wavy hair

Slightly messy, lived-in texture

Light stubble / short beard

Real skin texture, visible pores

No smoothing, no beautification

FRAME BREAKDOWN (VERY IMPORTANT)

TOP FRAME - BACK SHOT

Back view of the subject.

He is touching the back of his hair near the neck,

fingers slightly tangled in hair.

Head tilted slightly down and to the side. Relaxed posture, candid movement.

Hair texture clearly visible from behind.

MIDDLE FRAME close up
Tight close-up near the eyes and upper face. Messy strands of hair falling naturally near the eyes.

Eyes partially visible, soft focus.

Very slight motion softness from movement. Feels intimate, accidental, not posed.

BOTTOM FRAME - MID SHOT

Mid-shot from waist or chest up.

Subject leaning casually against the railing.

Looking sideways, not at the camera.

Expression calm, confident, contemplative.

Natural posture, effortless presence.

Lighting (LOCKED)

Warm artificial wall lighting mixed with cool night ambient light.

Soft illumination on face and shirt

Create an image of a selfie, without any clear subject or composition-just a random blueish snapshot taken unintentionally. The image should have slight motion blur and consistent lighting from streetlights. Both characters are together in the selfie and the image size ratio is 4:5 and does not change the facial features

Using the attached photo as a facial reference, preserve the person's facial identity accurately. Maintain the same facial structure, proportions, and key features. Do not stylize, replace, or alter the identity. A close-up photograph of a young woman displayed on the LCD screen of a compact Canon digital camera. The camera body frames the image, with physical buttons, dials, and textured plastic clearly visible, including the FUNC/SET wheel, the DISP button, and the "IMAGE STABILIZER" label along the side of the camera body.

On the camera screen, the photo shows the same woman indoors at night, captured with a built-in flash. The harsh direct flash creates sharp highlights on her face and hair, emphasizing skin texture and natural imperfections. She has long dark hair falling loosely across part of her face, with a soft, slightly open-lip expression that feels candid and unposed.

The background is a dim, cluttered kitchen environment with appliances, shelves, and metallic surfaces, softly blurred due to flash falloff and shallow depth. The contrast between the bright flash flash and the low ambient light creates a raw, documentary feel.

The overall mood is candid, raw, and nostalgic, reminiscent of early 2000s compact digital camera snapshots. Colors are slightly muted with cool undertones, strong flash contrast, subtle digital noise, and authentic LCD screen grain and glow. No text, no logos, and no Ul overlays inside the photo preview itself.

Using the attached photo as a facial reference, preserve the person's facial identity accurately and consistently. Keep the original facial structure, proportions, and key features intact. Do not alter, stylize, or replace the face.

Create a portrait of the same young woman, captured with a 1990s-style camera using a harsh direct front flash. The flash creates a bright, nostalgic glow with strong contrast and natural falloff into the background. She has messy dark brown hair tied up loosely, with a calm yet playful smile that feels natural and unposed. Her skin appears porcelain-white under the flash, with realistic texture and subtle imperfections preserved. She is wearing a modern oversized cream sweater, adding a soft contrast to the harsh flash lighting.

The background is a dark white wall covered with aesthetic magazine posters and stickers, suggesting a cozy personal bedroom atmosphere. The ambient lig light is low, allowing the flash to dominate the scene while the background remains softly visible. Shot on a 35mm lens with on-camera flash, shallow depth of field, and authentic 1990s point-and-shoot aesthetics. Colors are slightly muted, with cool undertones, subtle grain, and a raw, nostalgic snapshot feel.

A cinematic movie poster style image with a strict 4:5 aspect ratio, shot from a perfectly vertical 90 degree top down camera angle. A single person of my choosing stands exactly at the center of the frame, looking straight up at the camera, where the person’s gender, age, ethnicity, facial features, hairstyle, and body type can be changed as needed for each generation. Beneath the person is a detailed architectural blueprint floor in teal blue tones, filled with precise orange technical line drawings, measurements, arrows, circular markings, and schematic elements. A large circular compass or targeting dial is perfectly aligned under the subject, reinforcing symmetry and focus. The lighting is cinematic and controlled, with a soft overhead spotlight creating defined shadows around the person. The color palette is limited to teal blue, cyan, and warm orange accents for high contrast and graphic clarity. The person is wearing [fully customizable outfit including jacket, inner layer, pants, and shoes], styled intentionally based on the desired character or brand direction. The composition is minimal, sharp, and highly structured, with a professional film marketing poster aesthetic, ultra high detail, crisp focus, and cinematic color grading. No text, no logos, no typography, no watermarks.

Ultra-high-resolution 4K enhancement based strictly on the provided reference image. Absolute fidelity to original facial anatomy, proportions, and identity. design. Recover fine-grain detail with natural realism. Enhance pores, fine lines, hair strands, eyelashes, fabric weave, seams, and material edges without introducing stylization. Maintain original color science, white balance, and tonal relationships exactly as captured. Lighting direction, intensity, contrast, and shadow behavior must match the source image precisely, with only improved clarity and expanded dynamic range. No relighting, no reshaping. Remove any grain. Apply controlled sharpening and high-frequency detail reconstruction. Remove compression artifacts and noise while retaining authentic texture. No smoothing, no plastic skin, no artificial gloss. Facial features must remain consistent across the entire image with coherent anatomy and clean, stable edges. Negative constraints: no warping, no facial drift, no added or missing anatomy, no altered hands, no distortions, no perspective shift, no text or graphics, no hallucinated detail, no stylized rendering. Output must read as a true-to-life, photorealistic upscale that matches the reference exactly, only clearer, sharper, and higher resolution.
